text:
Once upon a time, young Penelope dreams of sea adventures. She wishes she could sail away with pirates. She practices tying knots, learning ship tales. One day, she finds an old treasure map.

Penelope races home. When dawn breaks, she hides deep in woodlands. She finds caves! But it's pirate treasure! Coins sparkle. She wants just one thing: a compass. Next day, pirate arrives. They shake hands.

Penelope learns plenty. She finds fame: her own story retold. She sails far, meets exotic lands. Compass guides her safely homeward. Friends remember her adventures. She smiles, knowing pirate tales she spread became her own.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
